case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ERWIN DIMAILIG GALINATO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO JUL-29-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
